meta.description: Resume of Oscar Miguel Toro Torres - Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience
meta.title: CV - Oscar Miguel Toro Torres | Software Engineer
sidebar.about.title: About Me
sidebar.about.text: Senior software engineer with 10+ years of experience developing high-impact enterprise and financial solutions. Currently at Intive, serving as Software Engineer for GCH (the US Short Code Registry), building scalable backend systems with NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Previously led full-stack development for Banco Supervielle (Argentina) with .NET Core, Angular, Flutter, GCP, and AWS. Creator of Finaan, an AI-powered accounting platform built with Flutter, Go, and Google Cloud (Vertex AI, Cloud Run, Firestore). Proven track record implementing Clean Architecture, CQRS/DDD, and Event-Driven patterns in mission-critical production environments. Certified Scrum Master with a strong focus on quality, scalability, and continuous value delivery.

main.experience.title: Work Experience
main.expGCH.role: Software Engineer - GCH (Short Code Registry) – Intive
main.expGCH.desc:
• Backend: RESTful APIs with NestJS/TypeScript (modular DDD architecture), Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL 16, Redis caching, BullMQ for background job processing, Swagger/OpenAPI documentation, Jest testing.
• Cloud/DevOps: AWS (Cognito, S3, QuickSight, X-Ray, ECR), Google Cloud Storage, Docker multi-stage builds, Kubernetes (multi-env deployments with External Secrets), Bitbucket Pipelines CI/CD.
• Integrations: Chargebee (payment/billing), USPS, SMS aggregators, content providers for short code lifecycle management.
main.expGCH.projects: • Project: SCR Platform - Short code reservation, leasing, order processing, invoicing, and analytics platform for the US telecommunications industry.
main.expFinaan.desc:
• Mobile: Multi-platform app (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop) with Flutter/Dart, Clean Architecture + Provider pattern, GoRouter, GetIt/Injectable DI, Drift ORM with SQLCipher encryption, ML Kit for document scanning.
• Backend: Go 1.24 microservices on Google Cloud Run with Vertex AI integration for invoice OCR, intelligent expense categorization, and financial analysis.
• Cloud/Infra: GCP (Cloud Run, Vertex AI, Cloud Storage, KMS, Secret Manager), Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Hosting), GitHub Actions CI/CD.
main.expFinaan.projects: • Product: AI-powered accounting platform for SMEs — invoice processing, receipt scanning, financial reporting (Excel/CSV export), voice input, email integration, and real-time cross-platform sync.
main.exp1.role: Lead Full-Stack Developer - Banco Supervielle – Intive
main.exp1.desc:
• Backend: RESTful APIs and microservices with .NET Core 6.0/8.0 (Clean Architecture, CQRS + MediatR, Entity Framework Core, OAuth 2.0), serverless AWS Lambda functions with Python 3.11, RabbitMQ and AWS SQS integration for asynchronous messaging.
• Frontend: Angular 12+ with NgRx for state management, PrimeNG/Material UI, testing with Cypress/Jasmine.
• Mobile: Clean/DDD architecture in Flutter/Dart with Go backend (GCP Cloud Functions), Firebase (Auth/Firestore), Riverpod, Google APIs (Gmail, Sheets, Drive), AES-256/JWT security.
• Cloud/DevOps: AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, SQS, API Gateway, EC2, Cognito, KMS), GCP (Cloud Functions, Vertex AI, APIs), Firebase, Kubernetes (k3s/k8s), Keycloak, Docker, GitLab CI/CD, IBM API Connect, SonarQube.
main.exp1.projects: • Projects: Online Banking for Businesses (merchant enrollment, digitization, collections with mass direct debits), Service Portal (QR, electronic payments, POS terminals). View site
main.exp2.desc:
• Platforms: Rancher, Consul, Sonar, Kibana, Jira, Confluence, GitLab
• SCRUM, CI/CD Azure DevOps, Azure Portal, PostgreSQL, ASP.NET Core, Angular
main.exp2.projects: • Project: CEDULA RURAL - Rural development management system. View site
main.exp3.desc:
• Front-End: Angular, HTML5, CSS3, JS, JQuery, Bootstrap, SASS
• Back-End: C# ASP.NET Core, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Jira, BitBucket
main.exp3.projects:
• Projects: ARCHIVO SINDICAL - Labor union management system. View site
• PAIWEB 2.0 - Vaccination management system. View site
main.exp4.desc:
• Front-End: JS, JQuery, Kendo UI, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
• Back-End: C# .Net Core, PL/SQL Oracle, SCRUM, documentation
main.exp4.projects: • Project: SALUD.SIS - Design and development of integrated health management system. View site
main.exp5.desc: • Unit testing NUnit C#, PL/SQL queries, TFS Visual Studio
main.exp6.desc:
• Back-End: C#, Java Spring Boot; Front-End: Thymeleaf, Angular
• SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SCRUM

main.projects.title: Featured Projects
main.projects.finaan.desc: AI-powered multi-platform accounting application for SMEs. Features invoice OCR with Vertex AI, intelligent expense categorization, financial reporting, and cross-platform sync. Built with Clean Architecture, Provider pattern, and Go microservices on Google Cloud Run.
